title: ophrys sphegodes subsp. liburnica
intro: Ophrys sphegodes subsp. liburnica, also known as the Bee Orchid, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Traditionally used in folk medicine, the plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits, such as wound healing and the management of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Ophrys sphegodes subsp. liburnica include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions. However, more research is needed to fully understand the efficacy and safety of using this plant for medicinal purposes.
